query: I just finished the mockup for our new settings page in Figma. can you review it for accessibility before I hand it off to the developers?
annotate my Figma design with a11y specs — I need focus order, heading levels, landmarks, and ARIA roles documented for the dev team
check my mockup for contrast issues and target size compliance. the designer used some subtle grays and small touch targets
is my design ready for accessibility handoff? I want to make sure nothing blocks the developers when they start building
I'm designing a new onboarding flow with 5 screens. can you create a11y specs for each screen so the developers know what landmarks, headings, and ARIA roles to use?
here's a screenshot of our mobile app redesign. can you do an inclusive design review and flag anything that might cause accessibility issues?
our design system has some components without defined focus states. can you identify which ones need attention and suggest focus styles?
I'm sharing my Figma file for the dashboard redesign — please check that all interactive elements have proper contrast and are large enough for touch
create a designer accessibility checklist for our team. we keep missing things like focus states and heading hierarchy in our handoffs
review the UI specs I exported from Figma — do the colour tokens meet WCAG AA contrast ratios? I'm especially worried about the muted text variants
run an axe-core scan on my running app at localhost:3000 and generate a WCAG compliance report
help me implement a focus trap for the modal dialog component in React. when it opens, tab should cycle within it
add aria-label attributes to all the icon buttons in my React navbar component
set up eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y in our TypeScript project so we catch accessibility issues during development
I need to write Playwright tests for the login form. test that it submits correctly and shows validation errors
can you create a REST API with Express and MongoDB for managing a todo list? I need CRUD endpoints
optimize the performance of our React dashboard — it's re-rendering too often and the charts are slow
help me fix the CSS layout on our pricing page. the cards don't align properly on tablet-sized screens
deploy our static site to Netlify and set up automatic deployments from the main branch
write a bash script that backs up our PostgreSQL database nightly and uploads the dump to S3
